summary: Rectal temperature measurement is preferred for its accuracy when assessing a hypothermic patient as it reflects central body temperature more reliably than other methods available at an emergency department setting. \boxed{\text{Rectal}} This ensures precise monitoring critical during such medical emergencies involving significant heat loss or cold exposure scenarios typical among outdoor personnel stationed far from conventional healthcare facilities.
